title: dimensional shifter
description: adds some cool magic with staffs and wizard bosses
body:
only adds 4 items, 3 blocks, 2 mobs (1 is a boss), 1 structure, and 1 potion effect.

There are 2 staffs, the first is craftable and used to get the potion effect, the second one is obtained from killing a custom boss that is contained in a custom structure

Currently, the potion effect gives you invisibility and makes you invincible, it also makes it so you can't interact with anything, so it is balanced. It also gives the player special interaction with 2 of the blocks I added.

Let me know if the boss is too easy or if you find a bug pls and thanks

I built this mod from scratch, so it is not that good, but hopefully in the future I will build it up to be something special also, this is my first mod I ever made

crafting recipies
